node_types.description: A mental health disorder, including diagnostic criteria, subtypes, and associated features.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the disorder (e.g., OCD, depression, tic disorder)

properties.name: diagnostic_criteria
properties.description: Criteria used for diagnosis (e.g., DSM-IV, ICD)

properties.name: subtype
properties.description: Subtype or specifier (e.g., with poor insight)

properties.name: course
properties.description: Typical course (e.g., chronic, waxing and waning)

supported_by_chapters: Chapter 18: Adjustment for Clients With Mental Retardation

node_types.description: A specific symptom or clinical feature, such as an obsession, compulsion, or avoidance behavior.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name or label of the symptom

properties.name: symptom_type
properties.description: Type of symptom (e.g., obsession, compulsion, avoidance, ritual)

properties.name: insight_level
properties.description: Degree of insight into the symptom

properties.name: distress_level
properties.description: Level of distress caused by the symptom

supported_by_chapters: Chapter 7: Treatment Planning: Understanding and Persuading
Chapter 8: Treatment Planning: In Vivo Exposure
Chapter 18: Adjustment for Clients With Mental Retardation

node_types.description: A standardized instrument or method used to assess symptoms, severity, or diagnosis.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the assessment tool (e.g., Y-BOCS, SCID)

properties.name: tool_type
properties.description: Type of tool (e.g., interview, questionnaire, rating scale)

supported_by_chapters: Chapter 7: Treatment Planning: Understanding and Persuading
Chapter 8: Treatment Planning: In Vivo Exposure
Chapter 18: Adjustment for Clients With Mental Retardation

node_types.description: A therapeutic intervention or approach for OCD or related disorders.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the treatment (e.g., CBT, exposure therapy, SRI)

properties.name: treatment_type
properties.description: Type of treatment (e.g., psychosocial, pharmacological, combined)

properties.name: special_population_adjustments
properties.description: Adjustments for children, intellectual disability, or cultural context

properties.description: Competence in addressing cultural or religious issues

node_types.description: A family member, friend, or other individual providing social support to the client.

properties.name: relationship_to_client
properties.description: Nature of the relationship (e.g., parent, spouse, friend)

properties.name: involvement_type
properties.description: Type of involvement (e.g., accommodation, support, conflict)

properties.name: cultural_or_religious_role
properties.description: Role in cultural or religious practices relevant to treatment

node_types.description: Cultural or religious factors relevant to assessment or treatment.

properties.name: context_type
properties.description: Type of context (e.g., Islamic, family tradition)

properties.name: impact_on_treatment
properties.description: How the context affects assessment or treatment

node_types.description: A structured plan for treatment, including goals, tasks, and schedule.

properties.name: client_agreement
properties.description: Record of client agreement to the plan

properties.description: Schedule for reviewing and updating the plan
